title: thesium sommieri
intro: Thesium sommieri, also known as woolly thyme or woolly thymus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Thymelaeaceae. It is a small perennial herb with a woody base and a woody stem that has small white or pink flowers. The medicinal properties of Thesium sommieri include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are due to the presence of thymus alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Thesium sommieri include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use in treating skin conditions like acne and eczema; it is also used to make herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be prepared by steeping the leaves in hot water or mixing them with other herbs in a tea blend.
